subject: Re: Booster bolus for the herd — Oct 27 confirmed
body:
Mike — Zoetis confirmed the inbound for Tuesday Oct 27. Plan to start chute work Wednesday morning if that works. Will swing by Monday with the rest of the chute consumables.

Midori

subject: Blackwood Q4 booster — quote
body:
Ron — pricing the IBR/BVD booster at the standing $14.20/bolus, 63 head = $894.60. Inbound window once Zoetis confirms. Will send the PO for your sign-off.

Midori

subject: Re: Vibrio/Lepto for the cows
body:
Dana — penciling you in Oct 29 morning for the 40 head. Confirm the chute will be ready and I'll bring the doses.

Midori
